svg.title: RISC-V 5-Stage Pipeline CPU Architecture
svg.desc: Diagram showing IF, ID, EX, MEM, WB pipeline stages with register file, ALU, memory, and control unit

g.text: R / I / S / B / U / J instruction formats · 32 registers · 32-bit words

svg.text: Click a component in a real diagram to learn more · Pipeline registers between stages not shown for clarity
